name: bough
description: bough — per-worktree isolated dev environments + continuous-learning instincts, driven from Claude Code.

plugins.name: bough
plugins.description: Commands + skill only, no hooks: /bough:* slash commands and the using-bough skill. Inert until invoked, so it is safe at any scope. Pair with `bough claude hook install` when you want observation.

plugins.name: bough-hooks
plugins.description: Hooks only: bough's observe -> instinct -> inject -> evolve loop plus WorktreeCreate/Remove. Install with --scope project so it observes just that repo.

plugins.name: bough-all
plugins.description: Everything: /bough:* commands, the using-bough skill, and the hook loop. Install with --scope project to keep the hooks to one repo.
